name: American Express Platinum Reserve Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 Membership Rewards Point / Rs 50 spent on eligible categories
5 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent via Reward Multiplier on select brands
3 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent on select travel bookings

exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms
milestoneBenefits: Rs 1,000 voucher every month on spending Rs 50,000 or more in a calendar month, subject to enrollment
100% annual fee waiver on previous-year spends of Rs 10,00,000 and above
additionalBenefits: 11,000 Membership Rewards points as welcome gift on spending Rs 30,000 within first 90 days
12 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year, capped at 3 per quarter
2 complimentary international lounge visits per year through Priority Pass
Complimentary Taj Epicure, Accor Plus Traveller and EazyDiner Prime memberships listed by American Express
Golf benefit up to twice per month on meeting monthly spend criteria
3X Membership Rewards points through Reward Multiplier and 5X through RewardXcelerator

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point → 1 Marriott Bonvoy point · up to Rs 1/point

salaried: Eligibility is subject to American Express premium card approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to American Express premium card approval criteria
